tools.name: get_stock_quotes
tools.description: Get real-time stock price quotes for one or more symbols. Returns price, % change, 52-week high/low, exchange, and currency.

tools.name: get_market_indices
tools.description: Get major market indices and macro indicators: S&P 500, NASDAQ, VIX, 10-Year Treasury, WTI Oil, Gold, USD/EUR. Data from FRED (St. Louis Fed).

tools.name: get_institutional_holdings
tools.description: Get institutional investor 13F SEC filings for a given CIK or institution name. Default is Berkshire Hathaway (CIK 0001067983).
